criteria.reason: Backend ingestion service and upload API are implemented and covered by tests.
Document agent run produces human-readable extraction/output/review and feedback creates a newer version.
Document/generic agent smoke asserts no external dispatch and lint guardrails preserve dispatch boundaries.
System booking/marketing agent config persisted through normal paid business profile endpoint.
Authenticated production UI smoke reached /dashboard/agents, run details, technical journal markers, and no console errors.

commands_run: docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_document_api.py
